video_title: Introduction to Genomics and DNA Sequencing
speaker: Prof. Sarah Jenkins

chapters.title: DNA Structure and Function
chapters.transcript: DNA double helix, nucleotides ATCG, genes code for proteins. Human genome has 3 billion base pairs.

chapters.title: Next-Generation Sequencing
chapters.transcript: Illumina, PacBio, Oxford Nanopore. Short vs long reads. Sequencing by synthesis.

chapters.title: Genome Assembly
chapters.transcript: Overlap-layout-consensus, de Bruijn graphs. Short-read assembly challenges. Reference-based vs de novo.

chapters.title: Variant Calling
chapters.transcript: SNPs, indels, structural variants. Mapping reads to reference. GATK pipeline.

chapters.title: Functional Genomics
chapters.transcript: RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq. Gene expression and regulation.
